text: I'm not sure if this is correct. ChatGPT said I should submit my proposal and work for a new possible port I created here to see if its worthy to be added to the ports collection. If so, this is a link to my Makefile and everything to build it here: https://github.com/mephistolist/xsser-port.git . You can put those file in /usr/ports/security/xsser to test it. Otherwise, if you could point me in the right direction I would appreciate it. Thanks
